/usr/bin/ar qc libvdjson.a CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/jsonnametable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/jsonoutput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/jsonreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/jsonvalue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/jsonwriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdjson.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvdjson.a
